name: CLI & Agent-First Onboarding
objective: Standalone installable CLI so a user inside Claude Code or Codex can sign up, log in, configure credentials, and use the knowledge features end to end, with agent-readable help/guide docs so the website is never required

review.note: All 5 slices validated together (cli 39, root 65/12, parity 34/0-cli, smoke faithful). Code deliverables complete + proven on localhost; edge routing deployed+verified. Hosted end-to-end pending the one-time P10-P13 accounts-plane cutover (runbook in operations.md, corrected with the boot-deadlock fix). 8 durable docs consolidated.
